notes: Sharper clinical reasoning in chat: it holds one evolving differential instead of swinging the likely cause to your latest message, checks a diagnosis's hallmarks before building on it (no pushing sleep apnea without its signs, no weight-loss advice at a normal BMI), prefers the simplest explanation first, and asks a few key questions rather than one every turn. The home box now recognizes symptoms written in Russian and Ukrainian (not just English), so they start the structured intake and red-flag check. Also fixed the voice recording bar overlapping its cancel button.
